text:
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/php5-ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-php-0.6.0.20120114/ffmpeg_movie.c:975:41: error: use of undeclared identifier 'CODEC_ID_MPEG2TS'; did you mean 'AV_CODEC_ID_MPEG2TS'?
    } else if (decoder_ctx->codec_id == CODEC_ID_MPEG2TS) {
                                        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                                        AV_CODEC_ID_MPEG2TS
/usr/local/include/libavcodec/avcodec.h:644:5: note: 'AV_CODEC_ID_MPEG2TS' declared here
    AV_CODEC_ID_MPEG2TS = 0x20000, /**< _FAKE_ codec to indicate a raw MPEG-2 TS
    ^
